# Subhajit Chatterjee - AI/ML Engineer & Frontend Developer
> High-performance engineer focused on production-ready AI and modern web architectures. Pursuing B.Tech in CSE at Brainware University.

## Capabilities
- **AI/ML**: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation), LLM Query Systems, NLP, Fake News Detection, Computer Vision.
- **Frontend**: Next.js, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Premium Web Design.
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express, Python (Flask/Django), SQL/NoSQL.
- **Performance**: Optimizing LLM response times (<1.5s), SEO optimization, responsive layouts.

## Technical Stack
- **Languages**: Python, JavaScript, C++, SQL.
- **Frameworks**: Next.js, React, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn.
- **Tools**: LangChain, Docker, AWS, Git.

## Key Projects
- **LLM-Powered Query System**: Policy doc analysis using RAG.
- **University Landing Page**: High-performance MERN application.
- **Grade Manager**: Custom HTTP server with JSON persistence.
- **Fake News Detection**: ML-based misinformation classifier.

## Experience
- **Frontend Developer Intern @ Creatiq Media**: Built responsive UI, integrated REST APIs, optimized frontend performance.

## Education
- **B.Tech in CSE**, Brainware University (2024-2028), CGPA: 8.3.
- **B.Sc (General)**, Uluberia College (2018-2021), CGPA: 7.1.
